query:
SELECT 
  eg.id,
  eg.name as grupo,
  jt.name as tema,
  COUNT(em.id) as total_membros
FROM jigsawExpertGroups eg
JOIN jigsawTopics jt ON jt.id = eg.topicId
LEFT JOIN jigsawExpertMembers em ON em.expertGroupId = eg.id
GROUP BY eg.id
ORDER BY eg.id;
